\tzpentry{ID3314}{Kaluza-Klein Magnetic Flux Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3314 introduces Kaluza-Klein Magnetic Flux Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Phi(x^ \mu, y) = \sum_{n=- \infty}^{ \infty} \phi_n(x^ \mu) e^{iny/R_ \text{KK}} \end{equation}
